_cell_types.dSPN: Direct pathway Spiny Projection Neuron (D1-MSN). Projects directly to GPi/SNr to promote movement. Channel complement: KCNQ as primary K+ channel. Resting Vm ~-80 mV.
_cell_types.iSPN: Indirect pathway Spiny Projection Neuron (D2-MSN). Projects to GPe to suppress movement. Channel complement: KCNQ + Kir + Kaf (or Kv4). More hyperpolarized resting Vm (~-85.4 mV), higher threshold for upstate generation — therefore requires fewer glutamate inputs to stay just-subthreshold.
_cell_types.upstate: Sustained plateau depolarisation (~-40 to -50 mV) driven by regenerative dendritic NMDA/Ca2+ currents. Threshold number of coincident glutamate inputs determines whether an upstate is triggered.
_cell_types.M1R_modulation: Muscarinic M1 receptor activation suppresses K+ channels (KCNQ in dSPN; KCNQ+Kir+Kaf in iSPN), increasing excitability and lowering the glutamate threshold for upstate generation. Modelled by scaling K+ conductances down 50–75%.
_cell_types.Na_block: Blocking Na+ channels (Naf) eliminates action potentials and removes Na+-dependent regenerative currents, isolating purely dendritic/passive subthreshold integration.
_cell_types.N_GLUT_note: In subthreshold families (225xx, 227xx), N_GLUT is deliberately set just below the upstate threshold for each cell type and K+ channel condition. Because K+ block lowers the threshold, fewer glutamate inputs are needed to stay subthreshold under M1R modulation.

sim225xx downsample.description: Subthreshold glutamate on dend[15] + single fast phasic GABA (12 synapses). GABA onset timing varied relative to glutamate. K+ channel modulation (M1R) tested. N_GLUT fixed just below upstate threshold per condition — adjusted so GABA modulation determines whether an upstate occurs.

N_GLUT.note: iSPN needs fewer inputs to stay subthreshold because it is more excitable at stronger K+ block.

sim225xx downsample.GABA: 12 fast synaptic (tau1=0.9 ms, tau2=18 ms, g=0.001 nS)
sim225xx downsample.stimulation: current clamp, AMPA+NMDA at 1 kHz; GABA timing swept 120–301 ms (10 ms then 1 ms resolution)

sims.2250: dSPN, ctrl K+, N_GLUT=14, GABA timing sweep (10 ms steps)
sims.2256: dSPN, 75% block, N_GLUT=12, fine timing (1 ms steps)
sims.2258: iSPN, KCNQ+Kir block, N_GLUT=11, fine timing
sims.2259: iSPN, KCNQ+Kir block, N_GLUT=11, fine timing
sims.22510: iSPN, KCNQ+Kir+Kv4 block, N_GLUT=11, fine timing
sims.22511: iSPN, KCNQ+Kir+Kv4 block, N_GLUT=11, fine timing
sims.22514: iSPN, KCNQ+Kir block, N_GLUT=12, fine timing
sims.22515: iSPN, KCNQ+Kir block, N_GLUT=12, fine timing
sims.22516: iSPN, KCNQ+Kir+Kv4 block, N_GLUT=12, fine timing
sims.22517: iSPN, KCNQ+Kir+Kv4 block, N_GLUT=12, fine timing

sim227xx downsample.description: Subthreshold glutamate on dend[15] + slow extrasynaptic GABA alone (170 synapses). GABA timing varied. K+ channel modulation tested. N_GLUT fixed just below upstate threshold per condition.
sim227xx downsample.GABA: 170 slow extrasynaptic (tau1=9 ms, tau2=180 ms, g=25 pS per synapse)
sim227xx downsample.stimulation: current clamp, AMPA+NMDA at 1 kHz; GABA timing swept 120–630 ms (30 ms then 3 ms resolution)

sims.2270: dSPN, ctrl K+, N_GLUT=14, timing sweep (30 ms steps)
sims.2276: dSPN, 75% block, N_GLUT=12, fine timing (3 ms steps)
sims.2278: iSPN, KCNQ+Kir block, N_GLUT=11, fine timing
sims.2279: iSPN, KCNQ+Kir block, N_GLUT=11, fine timing
sims.22710: iSPN, KCNQ+Kir+Kv4 block, N_GLUT=11, fine timing
sims.22711: iSPN, KCNQ+Kir+Kv4 block, N_GLUT=11, fine timing
sims.22714: iSPN, KCNQ+Kir block, N_GLUT=12, fine timing
sims.22715: iSPN, KCNQ+Kir block, N_GLUT=12, fine timing
sims.22716: iSPN, KCNQ+Kir+Kv4 block, N_GLUT=12, fine timing
sims.22717: iSPN, KCNQ+Kir+Kv4 block, N_GLUT=12, fine timing

sim241x downsample.description: Suprathreshold regime: 4 dendrites each receive clustered glutamate sufficient to reliably trigger upstates. Fast synaptic GABA (N_GABA varies 0–48) arrives 20 ms after glutamate. Tests whether fast GABA suppresses suprathreshold firing and how Na/K channels contribute.
sim241x downsample.dendrites: dSPN: dend[15,52,47,21]; iSPN: dend[18,33,5,11] (~157.5 µm from soma)
sim241x downsample.GABA: fast synaptic (tau1=0.9 ms, tau2=18 ms), N_GABA in {0,4,8,12,16,20,24,32,40,48}
sim241x downsample.stimulation: current clamp; GABA delay = 20 ms after glutamate onset

prefixes.2410: GABA only (no glutamate), ctrl — isolates GABA effect alone
prefixes.2411: Glutamate + GABA, ctrl (dSPN 60, iSPN 56 total inputs)
prefixes.2415: Glutamate + GABA, Na blocked — dendritic upstate without APs
prefixes.2416: GABA only, K+ reduced (KCNQ dSPN; KCNQ+Kir iSPN)
prefixes.2417: Glutamate + GABA, K+ reduced (KCNQ dSPN; KCNQ+Kir iSPN)
prefixes.2418: GABA only, K+ reduced (KCNQ+Kir+Kaf iSPN alt); N_GLUT=52 total
prefixes.2419: Glutamate + GABA, K+ reduced (KCNQ+Kir+Kaf iSPN alt); N_GLUT=52 total

sim251x downsample.description: Suprathreshold 4-dendrite glutamate + slow extrasynaptic GABA (N_GABA 0–480). GABA delay 20 ms. Tests whether slow tonic GABA suppresses upstates differently from fast GABA — slow GABA has a profound effect on iSPN.
sim251x downsample.GABA: slow extrasynaptic (tau1=9 ms, tau2=180 ms, g=25 pS), N_GABA in {0,40,80,120,160,200,240,320,400,480}

prefixes.2518: GABA only, K+ reduced (alt iSPN set); N_GLUT=52 total
prefixes.2519: Glutamate + GABA, K+ reduced (alt iSPN set); N_GLUT=52 total

sim261xx downsample.description: Subthreshold regime: N_GLUT varies 0–16 on a single dendrite (dend[15]), with fast phasic GABA (12 synapses) on other dendrites. Glutamate leads GABA by 10 ms. Tests temporal windows of dendritic integration and how K+/Na channel state shifts the threshold.
sim261xx downsample.cell_types: dSPN and iSPN (same N_GLUT applied to both)
sim261xx downsample.dendrites: dend[15] for glutamate; separate branches for GABA
sim261xx downsample.N_GLUT: Varies 0–16 per letter (same for dSPN and iSPN). Single dendrite dend[15] only — not multiplied across sites. N_GLUT=0 = GABA-alone baseline; N_GLUT=16 expected suprathreshold.
sim261xx downsample.GABA: 12 fast synaptic (tau1=0.9 ms, tau2=18 ms) on non-dend[15] branches; arrives 10 ms after glutamate
sim261xx downsample.stimulation: current clamp; glutamate precedes GABA by 10 ms

prefixes.2610: No GABA, ctrl K+ — glutamate dose-response alone
prefixes.2611: GABA present, ctrl K+ — GABA shunts glutamate, raises effective threshold
prefixes.2612: No GABA, K+ reduced (KCNQ dSPN; KCNQ+Kir+Kaf iSPN) — M1R lowers threshold
prefixes.2613: GABA present, K+ reduced — M1R vs GABA: do they cancel?
prefixes.2616: K+ reduced + Na blocked — passive dendritic integration, no APs

sim271xx downsample.description: Same design as sim261xx but GABA is slow extrasynaptic (170 synapses distributed). N_GLUT 0–16 on dend[15]. Slow-GABA counterpart to sim261xx.
sim271xx downsample.cell_types: dSPN and iSPN (same N_GLUT applied to both)
sim271xx downsample.N_GLUT: Varies 0–16 per letter (same for dSPN and iSPN). Single dendrite dend[15] only.
sim271xx downsample.GABA: 170 slow extrasynaptic (tau1=9 ms, tau2=180 ms, g=25 pS) distributed across dendrites; arrives 10 ms after glutamate

prefixes.2716: K+ reduced + Na blocked — passive integration only

sim281xx downsample.description: Suprathreshold clustered glutamate across 4 dendrites. Fast synaptic GABA (40 synapses) timing swept 100–300 ms. Tests the temporal window in which fast GABA can suppress or truncate an upstate. Na-block variants isolate the dendritic plateau.
sim281xx downsample.GABA: 40 fast synaptic synapses; timing swept 100–300 ms

sims.2810: dSPN 60 / iSPN 56 total inputs, ctrl, 10 ms timing steps
sims.2812: dSPN 60 / iSPN 56, M1R (KCNQ reduced), 10 ms steps
sims.28110: dSPN 60 / iSPN 56, ctrl, Na blocked, 10 ms steps
sims.28111: dSPN 60 / iSPN 56, ctrl, Na blocked, 1 ms steps
sims.28112: dSPN 60 / iSPN 56, M1R + Na blocked, 10 ms steps
sims.28113: dSPN 60 / iSPN 56, M1R + Na blocked, 1 ms steps
sims.28118: 52 total, M1R + Na blocked, 10 ms steps
sims.28119: 52 total, M1R + Na blocked, 1 ms steps

sim291xx downsample.description: Suprathreshold 4-dendrite glutamate + slow extrasynaptic GABA (1600 synapses). GABA timing swept 90–600 ms. Reversed-timing variants sweep glutamate time with GABA fixed. Slow-GABA counterpart to sim281xx.
sim291xx downsample.GABA: 1600 slow extrasynaptic (tau1=9 ms, tau2=180 ms, g=25 pS) distributed across all dendrites
sim291xx downsample.stimulation: current clamp; GABA timing swept 90–600 ms (30 ms or 5 ms steps); sim duration 800–1080 ms

sims.2910: dSPN 60 / iSPN 56 total, ctrl, 30 ms steps
sims.29110: dSPN 60 / iSPN 56, ctrl, Na blocked, 30 ms steps
sims.29111: dSPN 60 / iSPN 56, ctrl, Na blocked, 5 ms steps

sims.29119: 52 total, M1R + Na blocked, 5 ms steps
